message:
🐛 Fix navbar layout shift on demo toggle & auto-close dropdown on distance (#330)

Three fixes:

1. AgentSelector renders an invisible placeholder in demo mode instead of
   null, preserving the same space so neighboring navbar items don't shift
   when toggling demo mode on/off.

2. Navbar no longer conditionally mounts/unmounts AgentSelector. It's always
   rendered — in demo mode as an invisible placeholder, otherwise normally.

3. AgentStatusIndicator dropdown auto-closes when the mouse moves 20px+
   away from the combined trigger button + dropdown panel area. Uses a
   combined bounding box of both elements so users can freely move between
   the button and dropdown without it closing.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
